calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Zarich on behalf of Attorney Lenore Gerard for Cecilia McGraw.

The Court questioned why the Case Manager is being paid more than the Professional Fiduciary and why the Attorney for the Trustee was requesting fees for duties related to care of the Conservatee. Ms. Zarich stated that they were willing to reduce the Case Manager's fees to what the Court feels is appropriate and explained that there was no money in the Conservatorship. The Court informed Counsel that said fees were not appropriate, and that fees for the Trustee and the Conservator need to be separated out. The Court also informed Counsel that the assets are already in the name of the Successor Trustee and that the order will not include a provision ordering delivery to her as Successor Trustee. The Court will allow the accounting, but took the petition under submission to address the issue of the Attorney's fees and the Case Manager's fees.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Barbara R. Simon As Successor Trustee On The Declination Of The Named Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Barbara Simon. Grant Tomioka for Trustor. Cecilia McGraw in Propria Persona. Daniel Hopkins in Propria Persona. Ellen Hage in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented their objections and reported as to status regarding transfer of placement for the Conservatee. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Barbara Simon as Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order). Ms. Fox will petition for authorization to obtain a reverse mortgage.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
